# services.dockerRegistry

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.dockerRegistry`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.dockerRegistry.configFile` | `absolute path` | Path to CNCF distribution config file. Setting this option will override any configuration applied by the extraConfig option. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Docker Registry. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.enableDelete` | `boolean` | Enable delete for manifests and blobs. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.enableGarbageCollect` | `boolean` | Whether to enable garbage collect. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.enableRedisCache` | `boolean` | Whether to enable redis as blob cache. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.extraConfig` | `attribute set` | Docker extra registry configuration. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.garbageCollectDates` | `string` | Specification (in the format described by {manpage}`systemd.time(7)`) of the time at which the garbage collect will occur. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.listenAddress` | `string` | Docker registry host or ip to bind to. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Opens the port used by the firewall. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.package` | `package` | The distribution package to use. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Docker registry port to bind to. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.redisPassword` | `string` | Set redis password. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.redisUrl` | `string` | Set redis host and port. |
| `services.dockerRegistry.storagePath` | `null or absolute path` | Docker registry storage path for the filesystem storage backend. Set to null to configure another backend via extraConfig. |
